project_type: Go CLI/init binary for k3OS Linux distribution
language: Go 1.24 (module version), Go 1.25.1 available in sandbox
build_system: go build, CircleCI for CI/CD with test/e2e/release jobs
test_framework: testing stdlib + github.com/stretchr/testify (assert/require/mock), table-driven tests, interfaces for dependency injection
verification_instructions: 1. Run golangci-lint run ./... for linting+formatting. 2. Run go test ./... for unit tests. 3. Run go build ./... to verify compilation.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Go 1.25.1 and golangci-lint 2.1.6 available. No Docker daemon needed for unit tests. CircleCI runs docker-based e2e tests.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits. TDD approach. KISS/DRY/SOLID principles. golangci-lint for linting AND formatting. Feature branch from master.
key_patterns: Dependency injection via interfaces in internal/iface/iface.go. Mock implementations for testing (testify/mock). Package-per-concern under internal/. Build tags for linux-specific code (//go:build linux). Structured logging with log/slog. CLI via urfave/cli/v3. System paths via internal/system package. Reexec pattern for PID 1 operations.
directory_structure: main.go (entry point with reexec handlers), internal/cli/ (CLI commands), internal/cc/ (cloud-config appliers), internal/config/ (config structs/read/write), internal/iface/ (interfaces + osimpl), internal/mode/ (boot mode detection), internal/kernel/ (kernel info), internal/system/ (path constants), internal/mount/ (mount wrapper), internal/enterchroot/ (chroot/pivot_root logic), internal/transferroot/ (ramfs->tmpfs relocation), e2e/ (end-to-end tests in Docker)
